name: Ziti with Spicy Pesto Pantesco and Locatelli
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to a boil and add 2 tablespoons of salt.
2. In a blender, combine mint, basil, parsley, garlic, capers, tomatoes, black pepper, red pepper, and half the olive oil. Process in short bursts until roughly chopped.
3. Turn the blender on full and drizzle in the remaining oil while processing until smooth, about 1 minute. Remove the pesto and place it in a large serving bowl.
4. Cook the pasta according to package instructions until just al dente, then drain well. Toss the drained pasta in the serving bowl and toss with the pesto to coat.
5. Sprinkle with grated Locatelli and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
